name: Multi Grain Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups rice milk, soy milk, or skim milk (I used rice milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk the wet ingredients until foamy for about 30 seconds.
3. Combine the wet mixture with the dry ingredients.
4. Cook the pancakes as usual.
